<!-- AI Diff Patcher - A JavaScript tool for applying AI-generated diffs and patches to files -->

# ai-diff-patcher

A JavaScript-based tool for applying AI-generated diffs and patches to files.

[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/farmrecipes67/ai-diff-patcher)](./LICENSE)
[![Last Updated](https://img.shields.io/badge/last%20updated-2026--03--08-blue)]()
[![Node.js](https://img.shields.io/badge/node.js-JavaScript-green?logo=node.js)]()

## Overview

**ai-diff-patcher** is a utility designed to parse and apply diff/patch output — particularly those generated by AI tools — to source files. It provides a programmatic interface via Node.js for integrating diff patching into automated workflows.

## Project Structure

```
ai-diff-patcher/
├── .gitignore
├── GUIDE.md            # Usage guide and documentation
├── LICENSE             # Project license
├── README.md           # This file
├── package.json        # Node.js package configuration
└── src/
    └── index.js        # Main entry point / core logic
```

## Installation

### Prerequisites

- [Node.js](https://nodejs.org/) (check `package.json` for version requirements)

### Setup

1. **Clone the repository:**

   ```bash
   git clone https://github.com/farmrecipes67/ai-diff-patcher.git
   cd ai-diff-patcher
   ```

2. **Install dependencies:**

   ```bash
   npm install
   ```

## Usage

After installation, you can use the tool via its main entry point:

```javascript
const patcher = require('./src/index.js');
```

For detailed usage instructions and examples, please refer to the [GUIDE.md](./GUIDE.md).

### Quick Start

```bash
# Install dependencies
npm install

# Run the tool (check package.json for available scripts)
npm start
```

> **Note:** Refer to `package.json` for all available npm scripts and configuration details.
